003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
032
033/**
034 * JSON5-flavored {@link MarshalledMap}.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Carries the JSON5-specific surface that historically lived on {@link JsonMap}: a JSON5
038 * {@link #toString()}, JSON5 default-parser constructors, and convenience methods for working with
039 * JSON5 text. Use this class when you want a {@code Map}-shaped value whose textual form (and
040 * default parsing) is JSON5 ("simplified JSON" with unquoted keys, single-quoted strings, etc.).
041 *
042 * <p>
043 * For strict (RFC 8259) JSON behavior, use {@link JsonMap}. For a neutral, marshaller-agnostic
044 * base with no language coupling, use {@link MarshalledMap}.
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
047 * <p class='bjava'>
048 *    <jc>// Construct an empty Map</jc>
049 *    Json5Map <jv>map</jv> = Json5Map.<jsm>of</jsm>();
050 *
051 *    <jc>// Construct a Map from JSON5</jc>
052 *    <jv>map</jv> = Json5Map.<jsm>ofString</jsm>(<js>"{a:'A',b:{c:'C',d:123}}"</js>);
053 *
054 *    <jc>// JSON5 round-trip via toString()</jc>
055 *    String <jv>s</jv> = <jv>map</jv>.toString();  <jc>// "{a:'A',b:{c:'C',d:123}}"</jc>
056 * </p>
057 *
058 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
059 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
060 * </ul>
061 */
062@SuppressWarnings({
063   "java:S2160" // equals() / hashCode() inherited from MarshalledMap; map equality is element-based
064})
065public class Json5Map extends MarshalledMap {
066
067   @SuppressWarnings({
068      "java:S2160", // equals() / hashCode() inherited from Json5Map; map equality is element-based
069      "java:S110"   // Inheritance depth inherited from MarshalledMap -> LinkedHashMap chain; intentional
070   })
071   private static class UnmodifiableJson5Map extends Json5Map {
072      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
073
074      @SuppressWarnings({
075         "synthetic-access" // Access to outer class members is intentional
076      })
077      UnmodifiableJson5Map(Json5Map contents) {
078         if (nn(contents))
079            contents.forEach(super::put);
080      }
081
082      @Override
083      public boolean isUnmodifiable() { return true; }
084
085      @Override
086      public Object put(String key, Object val) {
087         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
088      }
089
090      @Override
091      public Object remove(Object key) {
092         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
093      }
094   }
095
096   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
097
098   /**
099    * An empty read-only Json5Map.
100    *
101    * @serial exclude
102    */
103   @SuppressWarnings({
104      "java:S2386", // Public static final field accessed externally, cannot be protected
105      "java:S110"   // Anonymous subclass of Json5Map inherits the MarshalledMap -> LinkedHashMap chain; intentional
106   })
107   public static final Json5Map EMPTY_MAP = new Json5Map() {
108
109      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
110
111      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
112      public Set<Map.Entry<String,Object>> entrySet() {
113         return Collections.<String,Object>emptyMap().entrySet();
114      }
115
116      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
117      public Set<String> keySet() {
118         return Collections.<String,Object>emptyMap().keySet();
119      }
120
121      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
122      public Object put(String key, Object value) {
123         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
124      }
125
126      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
127      public Object remove(Object key) {
128         throw unsupportedOpReadOnly();
129      }
130
131      @Override /* Overridden from Map */
132      public Collection<Object> values() {
133         return mape().values();
134      }
135   };
136
137   /**
138    * Construct an empty map.
139    *
140    * @return An empty map.
141    */
142   public static Json5Map create() {
143      return new Json5Map();
144   }
145
146   /**
147    * Construct an empty filtered map.
148    *
149    * @return An empty map.
150    */
151   public static Json5Map filteredMap() {
152      return create().filtered();
153   }
154
155   /**
156    * Construct a filtered map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
157    *
158    * <p>
159    * Same as {@link #of(Object...)} but calls {@link #filtered()} on the created map.
160    *
161    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
162    * @return A new map, never <jk>null</jk>.
163    */
164   public static Json5Map filteredMap(Object...keyValuePairs) {
165      return new Json5Map(keyValuePairs).filtered();
166   }
167
168   /**
169    * Construct a map initialized with the specified map.
170    *
171    * @param values
172    *    The map to copy.
173    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
174    *    <br>Keys will be converted to strings using {@link Object#toString()}.
175    * @return A new map or <jk>null</jk> if the map was <jk>null</jk>.
176    */
177   public static Json5Map of(Map<?,?> values) {
178      return values == null ? null : new Json5Map(values);
179   }
180
181   /**
182    * Construct a map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
183    *
184    * <h5 class='section'>Examples:</h5>
185    * <p class='bjava'>
186    *    Json5Map <jv>map</jv> = <jk>new</jk> Json5Map(<js>"key1"</js>,<js>"val1"</js>,<js>"key2"</js>,<js>"val2"</js>);
187    * </p>
188    *
189    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
190    * @return A new map, never <jk>null</jk>.
191    */
192   public static Json5Map of(Object...keyValuePairs) {
193      return new Json5Map(keyValuePairs);
194   }
195
196   /**
197    * Construct a map initialized with the specified JSON5 string.
198    *
199    * @param json5
200    *    The JSON5 text to parse.
201    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
202    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
203    */
204   public static Json5Map ofString(CharSequence json5) throws ParseException {
205      return json5 == null ? new Json5Map() : new Json5Map(json5);
206   }
207
208   /**
209    * Construct a map initialized with the specified reader containing JSON5.
210    *
211    * @param json5
212    *    The reader containing JSON5 text to parse.
213    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
214    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
215    */
216   public static Json5Map ofString(Reader json5) throws ParseException {
217      return json5 == null ? new Json5Map() : new Json5Map(json5);
218   }
219
220   /**
221    * Construct a map initialized with the specified string and parser.
222    *
223    * @param in The input being parsed.
224    * @param p
225    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
226    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link Json5Parser}.
227    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
228    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
229    */
230   public static Json5Map ofString(CharSequence in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
231      return in == null ? new Json5Map() : new Json5Map(in, p);
232   }
233
234   /**
235    * Construct a map initialized with the specified reader and parser.
236    *
237    * @param in
238    *    The reader containing the input being parsed.
239    * @param p
240    *    The parser to use to parse the input.
241    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link Json5Parser}.
242    * @return A new map (empty if the input was <jk>null</jk>), never <jk>null</jk>.
243    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
244    */
245   public static Json5Map ofString(Reader in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
246      return in == null ? new Json5Map() : new Json5Map(in, p);
247   }
248
249   /**
250    * Construct an empty map.
251    */
252   public Json5Map() {}
253
254   /**
255    * Construct an empty map with the specified bean context.
256    *
257    * @param session The bean session to use for creating beans.
258    */
259   public Json5Map(MarshallingSession session) {
260      super(session);
261   }
262
263   /**
264    * Construct a map initialized with the specified JSON5 text.
265    *
266    * @param json5 The JSON5 text to parse.
267    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
268    */
269   public Json5Map(CharSequence json5) throws ParseException {
270      this(json5, Json5Parser.DEFAULT);
271   }
272
273   /**
274    * Construct a map initialized with the specified string.
275    *
276    * @param in The input being parsed. Can be <jk>null</jk>.
277    * @param p The parser to use. If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link Json5Parser}.
278    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
279    */
280   public Json5Map(CharSequence in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
281      super(in, p == null ? Json5Parser.DEFAULT : p);
282   }
283
284   /**
285    * Construct a map initialized with the specified map.
286    *
287    * @param in
288    *    The map to copy.
289    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
290    *    <br>Keys will be converted to strings using {@link Object#toString()}.
291    */
292   public Json5Map(Map<?,?> in) {
293      super(in);
294   }
295
296   /**
297    * Construct a map initialized with the specified key/value pairs.
298    *
299    * @param keyValuePairs A list of key/value pairs to add to this map.
300    */
301   public Json5Map(Object...keyValuePairs) {
302      super(keyValuePairs);
303   }
304
305   /**
306    * Construct a map initialized with the specified reader containing JSON5.
307    *
308    * @param json5 The reader containing JSON5 text to parse.
309    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
310    */
311   public Json5Map(Reader json5) throws ParseException {
312      this(json5, Json5Parser.DEFAULT);
313   }
314
315   /**
316    * Construct a map initialized with the specified reader and parser.
317    *
318    * @param in The reader containing the input being parsed.
319    * @param p The parser to use. If <jk>null</jk>, uses {@link Json5Parser}.
320    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
321    */
322   public Json5Map(Reader in, Parser p) throws ParseException {
323      super(in, p == null ? Json5Parser.DEFAULT : p);
324   }
325
326   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
327   public Json5Map append(Map<String,Object> values) {
328      super.append(values);
329      return this;
330   }
331
332   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
333   public Json5Map append(String key, Object value) {
334      super.append(key, value);
335      return this;
336   }
337
338   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
339   @SuppressWarnings({
340      "unchecked", // Generic varargs is safe here: values are only iterated, not stored into a typed array.
341      "varargs"
342   })
343   public <T> Json5Map appendFirst(Predicate<T> test, String key, T...values) {
344      super.appendFirst(test, key, values);
345      return this;
346   }
347
348   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
349   public Json5Map appendIf(boolean flag, String key, Object value) {
350      super.appendIf(flag, key, value);
351      return this;
352   }
353
354   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
355   public <T> Json5Map appendIf(Predicate<T> test, String key, T value) {
356      super.appendIf(test, key, value);
357      return this;
358   }
359
360   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
361   public Json5Map appendIfAbsent(String key, Object value) {
362      super.appendIfAbsent(key, value);
363      return this;
364   }
365
366   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
367   public <T> Json5Map appendIfAbsentIf(Predicate<T> predicate, String key, T value) {
368      super.appendIfAbsentIf(predicate, key, value);
369      return this;
370   }
371
372   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
373   public Json5Map exclude(String...keys) {
374      var m2 = new Json5Map();
375      this.forEach((k, v) -> {
376         var exclude = false;
377         for (var kk : keys)
378            if (kk.equals(k))
379               exclude = true;
380         if (! exclude)
381            m2.put(k, v);
382      });
383      return m2;
384   }
385
386   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
387   public Json5Map filtered() {
388      super.filtered();
389      return this;
390   }
391
392   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
393   public Json5Map filtered(Predicate<Object> value) {
394      super.filtered(value);
395      return this;
396   }
397
398   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
399   public Json5List findList(String...keys) {
400      return find(Json5List.class, keys);
401   }
402
403   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
404   public Json5Map findMap(String...keys) {
405      return find(Json5Map.class, keys);
406   }
407
408   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
409   public Json5List getList(String key) {
410      return get(key, Json5List.class);
411   }
412
413   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
414   public Json5List getList(String key, boolean createIfNotExists) {
415      Json5List m = getWithDefault(key, null, Json5List.class);
416      if (m == null && createIfNotExists) {
417         m = new Json5List();
418         put(key, m);
419      }
420      return m;
421   }
422
423   /**
424    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link Json5List}.
425    *
426    * @param key The key.
427    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
428    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
429    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
430    */
431   public Json5List getList(String key, Json5List defVal) {
432      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, Json5List.class);
433   }
434
435   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
436   public Json5Map getMap(String key) {
437      return get(key, Json5Map.class);
438   }
439
440   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
441   public Json5Map getMap(String key, boolean createIfNotExists) {
442      var m = getWithDefault(key, null, Json5Map.class);
443      if (m == null && createIfNotExists) {
444         m = new Json5Map();
445         put(key, m);
446      }
447      return m;
448   }
449
450   /**
451    * Returns the specified entry value converted to a {@link Json5Map}.
452    *
453    * @param key The key.
454    * @param defVal The default value if the map doesn't contain the specified mapping.
455    * @return The converted value, or the default value if the map contains no mapping for this key.
456    * @throws InvalidDataConversionException If value cannot be converted.
457    */
458   public Json5Map getMap(String key, Json5Map defVal) {
459      return getWithDefault(key, defVal, Json5Map.class);
460   }
461
462   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
463   public Json5Map include(String...keys) {
464      var m2 = new Json5Map();
465      this.forEach((k, v) -> {
466         for (var kk : keys)
467            if (kk.equals(k))
468               m2.put(kk, v);
469      });
470      return m2;
471   }
472
473   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
474   public Json5Map inner(Map<String,Object> inner) {
475      super.inner(inner);
476      return this;
477   }
478
479   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
480   public Json5Map keepAll(String...keys) {
481      super.keepAll(keys);
482      return this;
483   }
484
485   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
486   public Json5Map modifiable() {
487      if (isUnmodifiable())
488         return new Json5Map(this);
489      return this;
490   }
491
492   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
493   protected Json5Map newMarshalledMap(MarshallingSession bs) {
494      return new Json5Map(bs);
495   }
496
497   /**
498    * Convenience method for inserting JSON5 directly into an attribute on this object.
499    *
500    * <p>
501    * The JSON5 text can be an object (i.e. <js>"{...}"</js>) or an array (i.e. <js>"[...]"</js>).
502    *
503    * @param key The key.
504    * @param json5 The JSON5 text that will be parsed into an Object and then inserted into this map.
505    * @throws ParseException Malformed input encountered.
506    */
507   public void putJson5(String key, String json5) throws ParseException {
508      this.put(key, Json5Parser.DEFAULT.parse(json5, Object.class));
509   }
510
511   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
512   public Json5Map session(MarshallingSession session) {
513      super.session(session);
514      return this;
515   }
516
517   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
518   public Json5Map setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value) {
519      super.setBeanSession(value);
520      return this;
521   }
522
523   /**
524    * Serializes this map to a JSON5 string.
525    *
526    * <p>
527    * A synonym for {@link #toString()}.
528    *
529    * @return This object as a JSON5 string.
530    */
531   public String toJson5() {
532      return Json5.DEFAULT.of(this);
533   }
534
535   /**
536    * Serializes this map to a readable (indented) JSON5 string using {@link Json5Serializer#DEFAULT_READABLE}.
537    *
538    * @return This object serialized as a readable JSON5 string.
539    */
540   public String toReadableJson5() {
541      if (Json5Serializer.DEFAULT_READABLE == null)
542         return s(this);
543      return Json5Serializer.DEFAULT_READABLE.toString(this);
544   }
545
546   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
547   public String toString() {
548      return Json5.DEFAULT.of(this);
549   }
550
551   @Override /* Overridden from MarshalledMap */
552   public Json5Map unmodifiable() {
553      if (this instanceof UnmodifiableJson5Map this2)
554         return this2;
555      return new UnmodifiableJson5Map(this);
556   }
557
558   /**
559    * Convenience method for serializing this map to the specified <c>Writer</c> using the
560    * {@link Json5Serializer#DEFAULT} serializer.
561    *
562    * @param w The writer to serialize this object to.
563    * @return This object.
564    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred trying to write to the writer.
565    * @throws SerializeException If a problem occurred trying to convert the output.
566    */
567   public Json5Map writeTo(Writer w) throws IOException, SerializeException {
568      Json5Serializer.DEFAULT.serialize(this, w);
569      return this;
570   }
571}
